hooks.command: powershell.exe -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; \$notify = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; \$notify.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; \$notify.Visible = \$true; \$notify.ShowBalloonTip(5000, 'Claude Code', '作業が完了しました', [System.Windows.Forms.ToolTipIcon]::Info); Start-Sleep -Seconds 3"
